text:
T-KT is the 2nd track on disc 2 of the "Attack on Titan" Season 3 Original Soundtrack.

As with all the other pre-The Final Season OSTs, it was composed and arranged by .

It was used as the ending theme of Episode 59.

Musical motifs

The track is a remix of [[ThanksAT|SymphonicSuite[AoT]Part2-6th:ThanksAT]].

All occurrences

Episode 59 - After the credits, Eren stares disillusioned out at the sea. Elsewhere, a sat figure is holding a seashell.

Ending animation

The ending animation of Episode 59 is a dark gray screen on which the credits roll. In the top left corner, there is a frame on which several images are shown:
Colored versions of images featured in Armin's grandfather's book.
A leaf with dew on it.
A lake at night with the reflection of the moon on its surface.
A glacier with an aurora borealis in the sky above them.
A desert illuminated by the sun shining bright above it.
A mountainous land standing on the sea.
Eren Jaeger shooting a rifle.
Brief flashes from the Struggle for Trost.
An explosion occurring in what seems to be a battlefield.
Warplanes flying in the skies above a warship cutting through the sea.
Soldiers in a trench firing their rifles.
Soldiers firing a cannon.
Brief flashes from the Fall of Wall Maria.
Lined soldiers about to shoot a line of prisoners.
Young Eren crying after the Fall of Wall Maria.
Marleyan citizens rejoicing in the streets after reading the news.
Children lined up, all wearing a uniform.
Close-up of young Eren crying.
A dead child under the rubble.
Parents crying after seeing their dead child.
Corpses on the ground, as blood rains on them.
Crying young Eren finally opens his eyes.
Flowers on the battlefield at dusk.
The sky of the Paths.
The last image goes full screen after the credits finish rolling.
